EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ILasDatasetToRasterFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control LasDataset to raster conversion.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("52A1576C-57F7-4D8F-BB44-A1ABE8DA34C1")]
public interface ILasDatasetToRasterFunctionArguments

Properties

AvgPointSpacing

Average point spacing.

double AvgPointSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CacheMaxNumSurfaces

Maximum number of different Las surfaces kept in this cache folder.

int CacheMaxNumSurfaces { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CacheRasterZTolerance

Z tolerance for Las rasters in the image cache folder, used for compression.

double CacheRasterZTolerance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellAggregationType

Cell aggregation type (how to bin).

esriRasterLasCellAggregationType CellAggregationType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterLasCellAggregationType

Examples

Sample Snippet

CellWidth

Cell width.

double CellWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassTypesSelected

Class types selected, e.g., esriRasterLasClassGround, or 217.

ILongArray ClassTypesSelected { get; set; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataType

Data type.

esriRasterLasDataType DataType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterLasDataType

Examples

Sample Snippet

LasDataset

The input Las dataset or Las dataset name.

object LasDataset { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

LasFileVersion

The input Las file version (the latest if multiple found).

string LasFileVersion { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxHoleWidthFilled

Fill holes up to this width or height by interpolation from hole boundaries.

double MaxHoleWidthFilled { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

NumPointsTotal

Total number of points for all Las files, all return types.

double NumPointsTotal { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReturnTypesSelected

Return types selected, e.g., esriRasterLasReturnFirst, 13.

ILongArray ReturnTypesSelected { get; set; }

Property Value

ILongArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

The spatial reference to be used, if NOT set in the LasDataset.

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Property Value

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

TinToRasterInterpolationType

Tin to raster interpolation type (how to rasterize the tin: Linear or NN).

esriSurfaceInterpolationType TinToRasterInterpolationType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSurfaceInterpolationType

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseConstraints

Indicates whether to use 3D constraints included in the LasDataset or not.

bool UseConstraints { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseTinning

Use tinning.

bool UseTinning { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

VoidFillMethod

Void fill method.

esriRasterLasVoidFillMethod VoidFillMethod { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRasterLasVoidFillMethod

Z Max.

double ZMax { get; set; }

double
